ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stock_exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock exchange */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the stock exchange */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the stock exchange */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the stock exchange */,
  "opening_hours_start" TEXT /* Time when the exchange opens */,
  "opening_hours_end" TEXT /* Time when the exchange closes */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the stock exchange */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the stock exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the stock (e.g., AAPL, GOOG) */,
  "stock_name" TEXT /* Full name of the stock */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the stock (e.g., technology, finance) */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock exchange where the stock is listed */,
  "stock_type" TEXT /* Type of stock (e.g., domestic, international) */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the stock */,
  "dividend_yield" REAL /* Dividend yield percentage */,
  "pe_ratio" REAL /* Price-to-earnings ratio */,
  "eps" REAL /* Earnings per share */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the stock information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES stock_exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock price record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being tracked */,
  "published_date" TEXT /* Date of the stock price record */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock on the given date */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "percent_change" REAL /* Percentage change in stock price from the previous day */,
  "volume_weighted_average_price" REAL /* Volume-weighted average price (VWAP) for the day */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the price data (e.g., NYSE, Bloomberg) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the price information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_volumes" (
  "volume_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock volume record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being tracked */,
  "published_date" TEXT /* Date of the stock volume record */,
  "traded_quantity" INTEGER /* Number of shares traded on the given date */,
  "traded_amount" REAL /* Total value of shares traded on the given date */,
  "average_volume_30_days" INTEGER /* Average trading volume over the last 30 days */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the volume data (e.g., NYSE, Bloomberg) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the volume information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("volume_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_volumes_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock status record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being tracked */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the stock (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the status was updated */,
  "status_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the current status (e.g., suspension, delisting) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_status_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sector */,
  "parent_sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent sector (for hierarchical sector organization) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the sector information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_sectors_parent_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_sector_id") REFERENCES stock_sectors ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., financial analyst, investor) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last date and time the user logged in */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last date and time the user account was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the stock */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the stock was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the client accessing the data */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the access was successful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being tracked */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was triggered */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message describing the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price threshold, volume threshold) */,
  "threshold_value" REAL /* Value that triggered the alert */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the alert has been read */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the alert was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being tracked */,
  "trend_date" TEXT /* Date when the trend was identified */,
  "trend_type" TEXT /* Type of trend (e.g., uptrend, downtrend) */,
  "trend_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the trend */,
  "trend_source" TEXT /* Source of the trend data (e.g., internal analysis, external report) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the trend was identified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_trends_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_exchange_relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock exchange */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "is_primary_listing" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the stock is primarily listed on the exchange */,
  "listing_date" TEXT /* Date when the stock was listed on the exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_exchange_relationships_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_exchange_relationships_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES stock_exchanges ("exchange_id")
)
